title: galearia affinis
side_effects: Galearia affinis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with medications. Improper use of the plant may lead to symptoms like nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain. In severe cases, it can also cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma exacerbation. Additionally, Galearia affinis may interact with blood thinners, leading to increased bleeding risk.
